code_dossier.name: SendEmailResponse.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) class representing the response structure for email sending operations in the third-party API module. It extends BaseResponse to inherit standard response fields like status code and message.

data.detailed_description:
SendEmailResponse is a specialized DTO (Data Transfer Object) class designed to encapsulate the response data returned after an email sending operation through the third-party service API. 

The class follows a minimalist design pattern by extending BaseResponse, which provides the foundational response structure including:
- A status code (ToBCodeEnum) indicating success or failure
- A message string providing human-readable feedback

Currently, SendEmailResponse acts as a marker/placeholder class with no additional fields beyond those inherited from BaseResponse. This design suggests either:
1. The email sending operation only needs to communicate success/failure status
2. The class is prepared for future extension with email-specific response fields (e.g., messageId, deliveryStatus, timestamp)

The class is positioned in the `com.zixin.thirdpartyapi.dto` package, indicating its role as a data contract for API communication in the third-party service integration layer.
responsibilities: Serve as the standardized response container for email sending API operations
Inherit and expose common response attributes (code, message) from BaseResponse
Provide type-safe distinction for email-related API responses in the third-party service module
Enable future extensibility for email-specific response fields without breaking existing contracts

interfaces.name: SendEmailResponse
interfaces.description: DTO class extending BaseResponse for email sending operation responses. Inherits code (ToBCodeEnum) and message (String) fields from parent class.
